/opt/rh/devtoolset-7/root/usr/bin/c++  -fopenmp -D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=0 -rdynamic CMakeFiles/test_mtpLevel.dir/tests/test_mtpLevel.cc.o -o ../../bin/descriptor/mtp/test_mtpLevel  -Wl,-rpath,/data/home/liuhanyu/hyliu/code/rubbish/test/AI2Pot/source/build/lib/descriptor/mtp ../../lib/libgtest.a ../../lib/libgtest_main.a ../../lib/descriptor/mtp/libmtpLevel.so ../../lib/libgtest.a -lpthread
